latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing is still not visually equivalent to the same-name reference: it is denser, larger, and uses a different dimension/storyboard style.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The expected views are present, but the generated view scale and spacing remain reference-mismatched, and the diagonal dimension cuts across the main view area.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The drawing still shows extra/non-reference DisplayDim stacks around the main and right views; the visible scheme is not the compact 12-target reference style.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text, arrows, extension lines, and leaders cluster heavily around the right side; the long diagonal/cross-sheet dimension line makes the sheet hard to read.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The title/data text block remains larger and differently placed than the compact reference title area.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes are present but do not match the reference placement/style and are not yet a clean manufacturing note block.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The new run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/f5e3033024dc, not stale v5 output.
The strict target-prune change reduced some excess, but the generated drawing still has visible over-dimensioning and dense right-side dimensions.
A long diagonal/cross-sheet dimension line remains, which is not present in the reference and hurts manufacturing readability.
API/reference metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.
